option.name: originalContent
option.value:
# Docker configuration for BookLog API FROM openjdk:17-jdk-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY build/libs/api-movil-gestor-libros-1.0-SNAPSHOT.jar app.jar
EXPOSE 8080
ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "app.jar"]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Build stage: compila el jar dentro del contenedor FROM gradle:8.7-jdk17 AS build WORKDIR /home/gradle/src COPY --chown=gradle:gradle . . RUN gradle clean bootJar --no-daemon
# Runtime stage: imagen liviana para ejecutar la app FROM eclipse-temurin:17-jre-jammy WORKDIR /app COPY --from=build /home/gradle/src/build/libs/api-movil-gestor-libros-1.0-SNAPSHOT.jar app.jar EXPOSE 8080 ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "app.jar"]
